body_preview:
Hi Benjamin,

Enter this code to complete the reset.

822331

If you didn't request this pin, we recommend you change your LinkedIn password.

Go to Settings & Privacy > Sign in & security > Change password

To further secure your account, you should also:

Enable two-step verification

Settings & Privacy > Sign in & security > Two-step verification

Check where you are signed in

Settings & Privacy > Sign in & security > Where you're signed in

Thanks for helping us keep your account secure.

The LinkedIn Team

----------------------------------------

This email was intended for Benjamin Barber (Civil Rights Litigator and Software Engineer
)
Learn why we included this: https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/4788?lang=en&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_security_ato_challenge_send_pin%3BVWKd%2FLGoRNKpPCzb3YGEQw%3D%3D&midToken=AQGEpmBPZVOktg&midSig=0UGDvlVnamrsc1&trk=eml-security_ato_challenge_send_pin-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer&trkEmail=eml-security_ato_challenge_send_pin-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer-null-4xcaz4~mngp8p6c~1s-null-null&eid=4xcaz4-mngp8p6c-1s
